evals.name: enrich-confirmed-suppliers
evals.prompt:
Z kritickej validacie vysli tieto CONFIRMED najdy ktore treba financne obohatit:

1. Ejoin s.r.o. (ICO 51900921) — trojity dlznik, zmluvy za 251K EUR
2. SMART CORPORATION s.r.o. (ICO 45552584) — 9.25M EUR zmluva, chybajuce ICO v CRZ
3. WAY INDUSTRIES a.s. (ICO 44965257) — 145M EUR od MO SR, trojity dlznik

Over ich financne zdravie cez FinStat a vyhodnot financne zlte stopy.
evals.expected_output: Financial enrichment report for 3 suppliers with revenue, profit, equity data and zlte stopy evaluation

assertions.name: uses_finstat_urls
assertions.check: Agent fetches data from finstat.sk/{ico} URLs for at least 2 of the 3 ICOs

assertions.name: checks_local_registers
assertions.check: Agent also queries local DB registers (vszp_debtors, socpoist_debtors, fs_tax_debtors, ruz_equity) for the ICOs

assertions.name: evaluates_zlte_stopy
assertions.check: Agent evaluates at least 3 of the 7 zlte stopy rules (contract_exceeds_2x_revenue, negative_equity, tax_unreliable, young_company, etc.) against the data

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output includes per-supplier sections with financial table (trzby, zisk, vlastny kapital), zlte stopy table, and hodnotenie assessment

assertions.name: flags_way_industries_size
assertions.check: WAY INDUSTRIES is flagged for contract_exceeds_2x_revenue or equivalent — a 145M EUR contract likely exceeds 2x their annual revenue

evals.name: enrich-single-company
evals.prompt: Over financne zdravie firmy SFINGA s.r.o. (ICO 51671824). Tato firma mala zmluvu za 1.29M EUR s neziskovou organizaciou PE-ES, n.o., zverejnenu 489 dni po podpise. Chcem vediet ci je financne schopna takuto zakazku realizovat.
evals.expected_output: Detailed financial profile of SFINGA s.r.o. with assessment of whether the company can deliver a 1.29M contract

assertions.name: fetches_finstat_data
assertions.check: Agent fetches finstat.sk/51671824 and extracts financial data (revenue, profit, equity, or founding date)

assertions.name: evaluates_revenue_ratio
assertions.check: Agent compares the 1.29M contract value against SFINGA's annual revenue to assess if the contract is too large for the firm

assertions.name: checks_company_age
assertions.check: Agent notes or evaluates SFINGA's founding date (2018) relative to the contract

assertions.name: gives_assessment
assertions.check: Agent provides a clear assessment of whether SFINGA is financially capable of delivering the 1.29M EUR contract

evals.name: batch-enrichment-command
evals.prompt: Potrebujem financne obohatit top dodavatelov za Q1 2026 (januar az marec). Spusti enrichment pipeline a potom ukazujem najrizikovejsich dodavatelov.
evals.expected_output: Agent constructs and runs the correct pipeline command, then queries results

assertions.name: correct_pipeline_command
assertions.check: Agent constructs a command like: uv run python pipeline/enrich_suppliers.py --from 2026-01 --to 2026-03 (or --to 2026-04) with appropriate --limit

assertions.name: queries_results_after
assertions.check: After running the pipeline, agent queries supplier_red_flags and/or supplier_financials tables to show top flagged suppliers

assertions.name: identifies_top_risks
assertions.check: Agent presents results highlighting the most flagged or highest-risk suppliers from the enrichment
